title: ascocentrum ampullaceum
intro: Ascocentrum ampullaceum, also known as the Cobra Lily, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its unique, cup-shaped flowers that resemble a cobra's hood. The Cobra Lily has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ascocentrum ampullaceum include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions and wounds, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal consumption.
